# Tattooing by Shervin

> Custom tattoo artist in San Francisco, California. Persian-inspired artwork with roots in traditional, Japanese, and illustrative tattoo styles.

## About

Shervin is a tattoo artist based in San Francisco, CA. He specializes in color work, drawing from traditional American, Japanese, and illustrative styles. Every piece is hand-drawn and one of a kind. His work is heavily influenced by Persian art and calligraphy.

## Services

- Custom tattoo design and application
- Color tattoos (traditional, Japanese, illustrative)
- Blackwork
- Flash tattoo designs
- Walk-in appointments (by availability)
- Tattoo consultations

## Booking

Clients can submit a tattoo request through the online booking form at shervintattoo.com. The process is: submit your idea, review and approve the design, send a deposit, get tattooed. Shervin typically responds within a few days.

## Contact

- Website: https://shervintattoo.com
- Email: shervinx510@gmail.com
- Instagram: @shervin.510 (https://instagram.com/shervin.510)
- Portfolio: @shervin.510

## Location

San Francisco, California, United States

## Alternative Domains

- https://persiantattoo.com (redirects to shervintattoo.com)
- https://californiatattooing.com (redirects to shervintattoo.com)

## Specialties

Color tattoo, traditional tattoo, Japanese tattoo, illustrative tattoo, Persian-inspired tattoo art, custom hand-drawn designs

## Price Range

Mid-range ($$). Pricing depends on size, placement, and complexity. Budget options from under $200 to $2,000+.
